Uses of Class
org.bytedeco.onnxruntime.OrtTrainingSession

  • Packages that use OrtTrainingSession 
    Package Description
    org.bytedeco.onnxruntime  

    • Uses of OrtTrainingSession in org.bytedeco.onnxruntime

      Methods in org.bytedeco.onnxruntime with parameters of type OrtTrainingSession 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      OrtStatus OrtTrainingApi.CopyBufferToParameters(OrtTrainingSession sess, OrtValue parameters_buffer, boolean trainable_only)
      \brief Copy parameter values from the given contiguous buffer held by parameters_buffer to the training state The parameters_buffer argument has to be of the size given by OrtTrainingApi::GetParametersSize api call, with matching setting for trainable_only argument.
      OrtStatus OrtTrainingApi.CopyParametersToBuffer(OrtTrainingSession sess, OrtValue parameters_buffer, boolean trainable_only)
      \brief Copy all parameters to a contiguous buffer held by the argument parameters_buffer The parameters_buffer has to be of the size given by GetParametersSize api call, with matching setting for the argument trainable_only.
      OrtStatus OrtTrainingApi.CreateTrainingSession(OrtEnv env, OrtSessionOptions options, OrtCheckpointState checkpoint_state, Pointer train_model_path, Pointer eval_model_path, Pointer optimizer_model_path, OrtTrainingSession out) 
      OrtStatus OrtTrainingApi.CreateTrainingSessionFromBuffer(OrtEnv env, OrtSessionOptions options, OrtCheckpointState checkpoint_state, Pointer train_model_data, long train_data_length, Pointer eval_model_data, long eval_data_length, Pointer optim_model_data, long optim_data_length, OrtTrainingSession out) 
      OrtStatus OrtTrainingApi.EvalStep(OrtTrainingSession sess, OrtRunOptions run_options, long inputs_len, OrtValue inputs, long outputs_len, OrtValue outputs) 
      OrtStatus OrtTrainingApi.EvalStep(OrtTrainingSession sess, OrtRunOptions run_options, long inputs_len, PointerPointer inputs, long outputs_len, PointerPointer outputs)
      \brief Computes the outputs for the eval model for the given inputs This function performs an eval step that computes the outputs of the eval model for the given inputs.
      OrtStatus OrtTrainingApi.ExportModelForInferencing(OrtTrainingSession sess, Pointer inference_model_path, long graph_outputs_len, byte[] graph_output_names) 
      OrtStatus OrtTrainingApi.ExportModelForInferencing(OrtTrainingSession sess, Pointer inference_model_path, long graph_outputs_len, ByteBuffer graph_output_names) 
      OrtStatus OrtTrainingApi.ExportModelForInferencing(OrtTrainingSession sess, Pointer inference_model_path, long graph_outputs_len, BytePointer graph_output_names) 
      OrtStatus OrtTrainingApi.ExportModelForInferencing(OrtTrainingSession sess, Pointer inference_model_path, long graph_outputs_len, PointerPointer graph_output_names)
      \}
      OrtStatus OrtTrainingApi.GetLearningRate(OrtTrainingSession sess, float[] learning_rate) 
      OrtStatus OrtTrainingApi.GetLearningRate(OrtTrainingSession sess, FloatBuffer learning_rate) 
      OrtStatus OrtTrainingApi.GetLearningRate(OrtTrainingSession sess, FloatPointer learning_rate)
      \brief Gets the current learning rate for this training session.
      OrtStatus OrtTrainingApi.GetParametersSize(OrtTrainingSession sess, SizeTPointer out, boolean trainable_only)
      \}
      OrtStatus OrtTrainingApi.LazyResetGrad(OrtTrainingSession session)
      \}
      OrtStatus OrtTrainingApi.OptimizerStep(OrtTrainingSession sess, OrtRunOptions run_options)
      \brief Performs the weight updates for the trainable parameters using the optimizer model.
      OrtStatus OrtTrainingApi.RegisterLinearLRScheduler(OrtTrainingSession sess, long warmup_step_count, long total_step_count, float initial_lr)
      \brief Registers a linear learning rate scheduler for the training session.
      void OrtTrainingApi.ReleaseTrainingSession(OrtTrainingSession input)
      \}
      OrtStatus OrtTrainingApi.SchedulerStep(OrtTrainingSession sess)
      \brief Update the learning rate based on the registered learing rate scheduler.
      OrtStatus OrtTrainingApi.SetLearningRate(OrtTrainingSession sess, float learning_rate)
      \brief Sets the learning rate for this training session.
      OrtStatus OrtTrainingApi.TrainingSessionGetEvalModelInputCount(OrtTrainingSession sess, SizeTPointer out)
      \brief Retrieves the number of user inputs in the eval model.
      OrtStatus OrtTrainingApi.TrainingSessionGetEvalModelInputName(OrtTrainingSession sess, long index, OrtAllocator allocator, byte[] output) 
      OrtStatus OrtTrainingApi.TrainingSessionGetEvalModelInputName(OrtTrainingSession sess, long index, OrtAllocator allocator, ByteBuffer output) 
      OrtStatus OrtTrainingApi.TrainingSessionGetEvalModelInputName(OrtTrainingSession sess, long index, OrtAllocator allocator, BytePointer output) 
      OrtStatus OrtTrainingApi.TrainingSessionGetEvalModelInputName(OrtTrainingSession sess, long index, OrtAllocator allocator, PointerPointer output)
      \brief Retrieves the name of the user input at given index in the eval model.
      OrtStatus OrtTrainingApi.TrainingSessionGetEvalModelOutputCount(OrtTrainingSession sess, SizeTPointer out)
      \brief Retrieves the number of user outputs in the eval model.

      OrtStatus OrtTrainingApi.TrainingSessionGetEvalModelOutputName(OrtTrainingSession sess, long index, OrtAllocator allocator, ByteBuffer output) 
      OrtStatus OrtTrainingApi.TrainingSessionGetEvalModelOutputName(OrtTrainingSession sess, long index, OrtAllocator allocator, BytePointer output) 
      OrtStatus OrtTrainingApi.TrainingSessionGetEvalModelOutputName(OrtTrainingSession sess, long index, OrtAllocator allocator, PointerPointer output)
      \brief Retrieves the names of user outputs in the eval model.
      OrtStatus OrtTrainingApi.TrainingSessionGetTrainingModelInputCount(OrtTrainingSession sess, SizeTPointer out)
      \}

      \brief Retrieves the name of the user input at given index in the training model.
      OrtStatus OrtTrainingApi.TrainingSessionGetTrainingModelOutputCount(OrtTrainingSession sess, SizeTPointer out)
      \}
      OrtStatus OrtTrainingApi.TrainingSessionGetTrainingModelOutputName(OrtTrainingSession sess, long index, OrtAllocator allocator, byte[] output) 
      OrtStatus OrtTrainingApi.TrainingSessionGetTrainingModelOutputName(OrtTrainingSession sess, long index, OrtAllocator allocator, ByteBuffer output) 
      OrtStatus OrtTrainingApi.TrainingSessionGetTrainingModelOutputName(OrtTrainingSession sess, long index, OrtAllocator allocator, BytePointer output) 
      OrtStatus OrtTrainingApi.TrainingSessionGetTrainingModelOutputName(OrtTrainingSession sess, long index, OrtAllocator allocator, PointerPointer output)
      \brief Retrieves the names of user outputs in the training model.
      OrtStatus OrtTrainingApi.TrainStep(OrtTrainingSession sess, OrtRunOptions run_options, long inputs_len, OrtValue inputs, long outputs_len, OrtValue outputs) 
      OrtStatus OrtTrainingApi.TrainStep(OrtTrainingSession sess, OrtRunOptions run_options, long inputs_len, PointerPointer inputs, long outputs_len, PointerPointer outputs)
      \brief Computes the outputs of the training model and the gradients of the trainable parameters for the given inputs This function performs a training step that computes the outputs of the training model and the gradients of the trainable parameters for the given inputs.
